name: manga-scrape

metadata.name: manga-scrape
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU General Public License v3 (GPLv3)
metadata.summary: A python package used for automating finding manga chapters

documentation:
# Manga

A collection of tools for scraping manga websites.
These tools are geared towards OSX but can be adapted otherwise.

modules.name: manga.tools.test_sites.status
documentation: Top Level Classes

class_variables.name: manga.tools.test_sites.status.Failed.reason
documentation: Set by subclasses

classes.name: manga.tools.test_sites.status.NoOpen
documentation: Failure Classes
Do not open URLs

classes.name: manga.tools.test_sites.status.ToOpen
documentation: Open URLs

functions.name: manga.tools.test_sites.test_url._test
documentation: Test if chapter x is found at a URL constructed from left, right, and x

functions.name: manga.tools.test_sites.test_url.test_url
documentation: If url is broken, return a failure class for it
pylint: disable=too-many-return-statements,too-many-branches

functions.name: manga.tools.test_sites.test_sites.evaluate_urls
documentation:
---
param delay: How many seconds to sleep before testing successive urls
param skip: A set of domains to skip
param update_pbar: A function that updates the progress bar to be called when a URL
  is tested
param urls: The list of URLs to test
---

functions.name: manga.tools.test_sites.test_sites.test_sites
documentation: Test each file in directory, print the results open them as needed

functions.name: manga.tools.no_unicode.replace_unicode
documentation: Replace unicode in x

functions.name: manga.tools.no_unicode.no_unicode
documentation: Remove unicode in each path's name

functions.name: manga.tools.inc_chapter.inc_str
documentation: Increment the last number in x

functions.name: manga.tools.inc_chapter.find_url
documentation:
Split data into by the found URL
Return the data on the left, the URL, and the data on the right

functions.name: manga.tools.inc_chapter.inc_chapter
documentation: Increment the number in both the URL and name of file

classes.name: manga.tools.open_new.tested.Tested
documentation: The results of testing every URL

functions.name: manga.tools.unnumbered_helper.scrub
documentation: Scrub a URL for easy comparison with others

functions.name: manga.tools.unnumbered_helper.read_dir
documentation:
Read a directory and map the scrubbed URLs to their chapter numbers a strings
Ignores .swp files but whines about them

functions.name: manga.tools.unnumbered_helper.get_url
documentation: Get the URL of the current tab

functions.name: manga.tools.unnumbered_helper.unnumbered_helper
documentation:
Print out the number of the chapter associated
with the manga displayed in the frontmost Chrome tab

functions.name: manga.tools.open_new.results.handle_results
documentation: Print out the test results and open each of the given URLs that should not be ignored

functions.name: manga.tools.open_new.open_new.evaluate
documentation:
Determine if url has a new chapter or not
Store the result in tested and update pbar

functions.name: manga.tools.open_new.open_new.open_new
documentation: Open each file in directory that has a new chapter ready

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.read_dir
documentation:
Read the files in a directory
Return a dict mapping the scrubbed URLs they contain to the files within
Fails if two files contain the same URLs after scrubbing
Read directory                           #

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.remove_unwanted_periods
documentation:
Remove periods that are not part of a number
Numbers are assumed to start and end with a digit, not a decimal point
Link Guess                             #

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.scrub
documentation:
Scrub a URL clean of 'mucky' information that makes it hard to compare with others
For example: remove 'www.' since not all URLs need this

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.diff_helper
documentation:
Return the substrings of a and b whose first character
is the first character that differs between a and b

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.are_same
documentation:
Determine if guessing and compare_to link to the same manga, and that they link to chapters
If they are both the same manga and same chapter, an exception is raised
compare_to may not contain guessing, and guessing must contain a chapter!

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.choose
documentation:
Prompt the user to select the nearest element in near to x
If near only has one option, that choice is selected automatically
May return None if the user selects no option

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.disp_warning
documentation: Print out a warning: x
Link Guess                             #

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.guess_single
documentation:
Try to replace the file in old for the same manga with raw, editing the title as needed
Return true on success
pylint: disable=too-many-locals

functions.name: manga.tools.guess.guess
documentation:
Try to update each file in directory corresponding to a file to guess
If yes, auto accepts proposed update; if force, ignores safety requirements
If dryrun, nothing is actually done
returns False on failure
Main Program                            #

variables.name: manga.tools.guess.MAX_CHAPTER
documentation: Higher has an increased chance of error

functions.name: manga.sites.test.get_domain
documentation: Extract the domain portion of a URL

functions.name: manga.sites.test._test
documentation:
Return true if the given chapter is found
If a timeout occurs, retries at most timeout_retries times; sleeps in between

functions.name: manga.sites.test.test
documentation:
Return true if the given chapter is found
If a timeout occurs, retries at most timeout_retries times; sleeps in between

functions.name: manga.utils.split_on_num.split_on_num
documentation:
Split x at the number greater than one
This assumes numbers end in a digit, not a decimal point
If only_positive, negative signs will not count as part of a number
Returns a tuple containing the string before the last number,
the last number as a float, and the remaining string

functions.name: manga.utils.extract_url.extract_url_from_contents
documentation: Extract the URL from the file data

functions.name: manga.utils.extract_url.extract_url
documentation: Extract the URL from the file

modules.name: manga.sites.domains
documentation:
The functions in this file return true if a chapter is found for the specific site
They take in as input the html of the webpage

functions.name: manga.sites.domains.mangakakalot_tv
documentation: Return true if chapter is found

functions.name: manga.sites.domains.true_
documentation: Special functions

functions.name: manga.utils.files.lsf
documentation: ls all files in d recursively, but ignore likely undesired files

functions.name: manga.utils.files.mv
documentation: Rename a to b
